internal_issues.description: MST claim used 1D Δr-distance (≈7,000 km) instead of 2D Euclidean Kruskal MST (≈11,700 km). Factor was 1.5×, should be 2.6×. Kill strengthens.
Footnote (ii) says dome coordinates identify Tenerife within ~25 km of GUI but actual GUI coords match to 3 decimal places (coincident). Needs precision fix.
Cross-convention tension in Even-more-constrained subsection: cites Δr=150 km but P1 uses 85 km band. Needs disambiguation.
